scripts.start: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); const bin = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'cmake-build-debug\\client.exe' : 'cmake-build-debug/client_bin'; cp.spawnSync(bin, process.argv.slice(1), {stdio: 'inherit', shell: true})"
scripts.server: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); const bin = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'cmake-build-debug\\server.exe' : 'cmake-build-debug/server_bin'; cp.spawnSync(bin, process.argv.slice(1), {stdio: 'inherit', shell: true})"
scripts.release:start: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); const bin = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'cmake-build-release\\client.exe' : 'cmake-build-release/client_bin'; cp.spawnSync(bin, process.argv.slice(1), {stdio: 'inherit', shell: true})"
scripts.release:server: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); const bin = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'cmake-build-release\\server.exe' : 'cmake-build-release/server_bin'; cp.spawnSync(bin, process.argv.slice(1), {stdio: 'inherit', shell: true})"
